ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading card */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading card */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of cards available in inventory */,
  "price" REAL /* Current market price of the card */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the card set */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., common, rare, mythic) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the card (e.g., mint, near mint, played) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the card's image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the card's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., buyer, seller, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the purchase */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of cards purchased */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the cards will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade offer */,
  "offer_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the offer */,
  "request_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the request */,
  "card_id_offered" INTEGER /* ID of the card being offered in the trade */,
  "card_id_requested" INTEGER /* ID of the card being requested in the trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was proposed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "offer_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card being offered */,
  "request_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card being requested */,
  "trade_message" TEXT /* Message from the offer user to the request user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trade status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_offer_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_card_id_offered FOREIGN KEY ("card_id_offered") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_card_id_requested FOREIGN KEY ("card_id_requested") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_request_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade for which feedback is given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Additional comments regarding the trade */,
  "response_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the other user in response (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "response_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments from the other user */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_feedback_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card whose inventory is being logged */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., added, sold, traded) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity of cards changed in the inventory */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change (if applicable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., restock, damage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being priced */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Recorded price of the card */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., internal, external market) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the reporting period */,
  "total_inventory_value" REAL /* Total value of inventory on hand */,
  "most_sold_card" INTEGER /* The ID of the most sold card during the reporting period */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades completed during the reporting period */,
  "most_traded_card" INTEGER /* ID of the most traded card during the reporting period */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of cards during the reporting period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
